channel.title: LISKFENCE
channel.description: Liskfense designs and deploys full-spectrum drones and counter-drone systems, protecting airports, ports, energy site sand government facilities worldwide with battle-proven, military-grade performance.

item.title: advantages
item.dc:creator: wurenji@uchenggroup.com
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Features
item.dc:creator: wurenji@uchenggroup.com
item.content:encoded:
Features

Recognition type

The vast majority of mainstream - brand drones and most FPV drones

Detection frequency band

It supports custom scanning from 70MHz to 6GHz. By default, the frequencies are 400MHz, 800MHz, 900MHz, 1.2GHz, 1.4GHz, 2.4GHz, 5.2GHz, and 5.8GHz.

Detection range

Mainstream-brand drones ≥10KM, FPV ≥2KM

DID/RID positioning range

DID ≥10KM, RID ≥5KM

Video Transmission Interception Range

≥1.5KM

FPV Video Transmission Detection

≥1.5KM

Precision

≤10m

Video Transmission Detection Frequency Band

Supports detection of all analog video transmissions within the 300MHz−6GHz frequency band (user-customizable).

Size

400mm∗165mm∗500mm

Battery life

≥6h

item.title: Airports
item.dc:creator: wurenji@uchenggroup.com
item.content:encoded:
Airports

Serving a variety of sectors, our innovative solutions combine cutting-edge performance with seamless usability to meet the evolving needs of our customers.

THREAT LANDSCAPE

Deployed across key sectors requiring the highest standards of performance.

Physical Impact

UAS penetrate runways and collide with aircraft engines; lab tests show destructive energy several times higher than bird strikes, creating crash risks.

Airspace Incursion

Rogue flights enter the 10 km airport protection zone, causing delays, diversions and, in severecases, total airport shutdown.

Contraband Delivery & Surveillance

Drones carry explosives or narcotics into
terminals and cargo aprons; covert filming ofsecurity lanes and baggage-sorting layouts opens critical security gaps.

Abilities

Deployed across key sectors requiring the highest standards of performance.

All-Domain Intelligent Awareness

• Three-layer network—RF detection + EO/IR recognition + mobile gap-filler—gives seamless protected-airspace-to-runway cover.
• Pinpoints small UAS and beats GPS-spoof evasion, cutting legacy missed calls.

Precision ID & Frequency Management

• Protocol parsing and AI image analysis distinguish cooperative aircraft from non-cooperative threats and flag anomalous flight paths in real time.
• Countermeasures lock only UAS frequency bands, strictly avoiding civil-aviation channels to keep flight communications safe.

Tiered Rapid-Response Protocol

• Four-step chain: early-warning divert → directional jamming → navigation spoofing → physical interception.
• Mobile systems pre-positioned at hot spots reach any runway incursion within 10 minutes.

Unified Command & Coordination Platform

• Integrates ATC, airport police and security ops for second-level threat sharing and one-click tasking.
• Full event playback and smart contingency matching boost multi-agency synergy and cut reaction times.

All-Domain Intelligent Awareness

• Three-layer network—RF detection + EO/IR recognition + mobile gap-filler—gives seamless protected-airspace-to-runway cover.
• Pinpoints small UAS and beats GPS-spoof evasion, cutting legacy missed calls.

Precision ID & Frequency Management

• Protocol parsing and AI image analysis distinguish cooperative aircraft from non-cooperative threats and flag anomalous flight paths in real time.
• Countermeasures lock only UAS frequency bands, strictly avoiding civil-aviation channels to keep flight communications safe.

Tiered Rapid-Response Protocol

• Four-step chain: early-warning divert → directional jamming → navigation spoofing → physical interception.
• Mobile systems pre-positioned at hot spots reach any runway incursion within 10 minutes.

Unified Command & Coordination Platform

• Integrates ATC, airport police and security ops for second-level threat sharing and one-click tasking.
• Full event playback and smart contingency matching boost multi-agency synergy and cut reaction times.

Features

Advantages

Our Solution

Detection Capability

Cooperative & non-cooperative UAVs fully identified; silent-target detection supported.

Deployment Flexibility

Fixed + mobile + temporary nodes, adapted to complex airport environments.

Countermeasure Accuracy

Directional jamming & navigation spoofing with minimal collateral impact.

Platform Integration

Air-ground unified platform—data fusion, event replay, pilot tracking in one stop.

Combat Proven

Field-deployed and operationally verified at multiple airports and major events.

Related Products

item.title: Plan Comparison
item.dc:creator: wurenji@uchenggroup.com
item.content:encoded:
Solution Comparison

Deployed across key sectors requiring the highest standards of performance.

SCENARIO
GEOGRAPHIC FEATURES
CROWD DENSITY
AIRSPACE COMPLEXITY
ANALYSIS
Airport

Flat, 10 km clearance zone

Medium

Extreme

10 km zone, seconds to react; radio + EO dual intercept ≤ 10 min.

Government complex

City/suburb mix

Medium

Med-High

Tall buildings, high secrecy; stealth 3-layer net, zero noise.

Attraction

Mountains hills open wild

High-Extreme

High

Packed tourists, wildlife; silent chase, 30 min set-up.

Power Grid

Mountains hills open wild

Low

Medium

Long lines, rough terrain; debris from drones causes short circuits.

Prisons

Mountains hills open wild

Low

Low

Open view; drones drop contraband, pilots hide inside vehicles.

Event Security

Downtown core complex routes

Extreme

Extreme

Pop-up NFZ, dense crowds; roving van + soldier kit in 3 h.

item.title: Government Complex
item.dc:creator: wurenji@uchenggroup.com
item.content:encoded:
Government Complex

Serving a variety of sectors, our innovative solutions combine cutting-edge performance with seamless usability to meet the evolving needs of our customers.

THREAT LANDSCAPE

Deployed across key sectors requiring the highest standards of performance.

Physical Attack

UAVs launched 2 km away perform low-level penetration: drop explosives / incendiary bottles, spray bio-agents, photograph inner security layouts, or ram VIP convoys and building entrances, potentially triggering terror incidents.

Information Theft

Personnel-triggered micro-drones lift off suddenly, reach critical zones within seconds, conduct close-range filming or drop jammers; extremely low signature and high concealment.

Silent Penetration

Wire-guided or inertial-navigation platforms emit zero RF, evade conventional sensors, exploit radar blind spots around core sites, and loiter before impact or payload release.

Abilities

Deployed across key sectors requiring the highest standards of performance.

Full-Area, Layered Surveillance System

• Three-tier network combining early warning, gap-filling recon and silent detection.
• Passive RF sensing with protocol analysis detects intruders up to 2 km.
• Separates micro-drones from birds and tracks radio-silent UAVs.

Graded, Precision Cuntermeasures

• Warning zone: identify aircraft and locate pilot
• Defense zone: spoof navigation and lock frequency bands without harming utility comms
• Core zone: launch mobile patrols for rapid interdiction

Rapid Pilot Trace-Back

• Custom protocol parsing + multi-site RF direction-finding pinpoints pilots hiding in buildings or vehicles
• Coordinates stream to command center for real-time officer dispatch—”detect and strike in one loop”

Mobile Patrol & Coordinated Response

• Vehicle-mounted systems conduct long-range patrols and swift intercepts
• Portable and gun-type units suppress sudden launches at close range
• Forms a “far–near” dual-layer quick-reaction network against immediate lift-off threats

Unified Smart Command Platform

• Integrates device control, multi-source data fusion and automated event handling
• Supports trajectory playback, incident back-tracking and custom reporting
• Boosts inter-agency collaboration and slashes response time

Full-Area, Layered Surveillance System

• Three-tier network combining early warning, gap-filling recon and silent detection.
• Passive RF sensing with protocol analysis detects intruders up to 2 km.
• Separates micro-drones from birds and tracks radio-silent UAVs.

Graded, Precision Cuntermeasures

• Warning zone: identify aircraft and locate pilot
• Defense zone: spoof navigation and lock frequency bands without harming utility comms
• Core zone: launch mobile patrols for rapid interdiction

Rapid Pilot Trace-Back

• Custom protocol parsing + multi-site RF direction-finding pinpoints pilots hiding in buildings or vehicles
• Coordinates stream to command center for real-time officer dispatch—"detect and strike in one loop"

Mobile Patrol & Coordinated Response

• Vehicle-mounted systems conduct long-range patrols and swift intercepts
• Portable and gun-type units suppress sudden launches at close range
• Forms a "far–near" dual-layer quick-reaction network against immediate lift-off threats

Unified Smart Command Platform

• Integrates device control, multi-source data fusion and automated event handling
• Supports trajectory playback, incident back-tracking and custom reporting
• Boosts inter-agency collaboration and slashes response time

Features

Advantages

Our Solution

Three-Tier Progressive Defense

The only system that delivers "Warning → Directional → 3-D" graduated countermeasures — no collateral damage, no missed detections.

Multi-Sensor Reconnaissance

RF + EO/IR + protocol parsing, covering 99 % of drone types (including silent platforms).

Pilot Origin Trace-Back

Reverse-geolocates operator coordinates to support police dispatch and rapid arrest.

Unified Platform

Single console manages all assets; event playback, data reports, role-based access.

Mobile Patrol & Intercept

Full range of vehicle-mounted, gun-type and man-pack assets — long-range patrol + close-in surge modes.

Unified Air-Ground Platform

Single pane for data governance, event analytics, algorithm updates and third-party integration.

Evergreen Update Service

Continuous "one aircraft, one file" signature library, protocol refreshes, algorithm iterations and custom development.

Compliant & Lawful

All countermeasures meet public-safety, anti-terror and radio-administration regulations — non-violent, non-destructive.

Related Products

item.title: Power Grid
item.dc:creator: wurenji@uchenggroup.com
item.content:encoded:
Power Grid Solutions

Serving a variety of sectors, our innovative solutions combine cutting-edge performance with seamless usability to meet the evolving needs of our customers.

THREAT LANDSCAPE

Deployed across key sectors requiring the highest standards of performance.

Physical Damage

UAS collide with high-voltage lines, causing short circuits.
Suspended wires, Molotov bottles or other foreign objects are dropped onto tower bases.
Crashes into substation battery banks trigger secondary disasters.

Information Theft

Low-altitude photography of substations, converter stations and line corridors to steal high-precision 3-D data.
Recording of inspection routines exposes equipment defects and operational weaknesses.

Operational Interference

Illegal flights disrupt emergency repairs during peak-summer or Spring-Festival guarantee periods.
Unmanned platforms lose control in strong magnetic fields and collide with inspection robots, delaying fault location.

Abilities

Deployed across key sectors requiring the highest standards of performance.

Spoofing & Countermeasures

• Full-chain closed-loop control
– Fuses RF sensing, protocol parsing and comm decoding to identify non-cooperative UAVs.
– Covers the entire facility with a 3 km buffer.
– Delivers:

1.Pre-event early warning

2.Mid-event real-time tracking

3.Post-event pilot back-tracing

Information Theft

• Precision Spoofing & Counter-UAS
– Radiates counterfeit GNSS signals to fool the UAV into hovering, forced-landing or returning home.
– One-to-one jamming; zero impact on nearby power/communication gear.
– Transmit power tailored to national regulations – full compliance on record.

Full-Chain Closed-Loop Control

• Customizable Back-End
– Global device health board, multi-dimensional flight-event analytics, auto-generated subject reports, multi-level user rights.
– Plug-in development for power-security missions.

Customizable Backend

• No-Dead-Zone Surveillance Grid
– Fixed stations: 80 % of substations & key towers.
– Vehicle-mounted patrol: along transmission lines, fills 15 % blind spots (mountains, river spans).
– Man-pack sets for emergency response: final 5 % ad-hoc threats.

Seamless Detection Deployment

• Fixed equipment covers 80 % of substations and key tower bases.
• Vehicle-mounted mobile units patrol transmission corridors, filling 15 % of blind spots in mountainous and river-crossing zones.
• Inspection personnel carry portable devices for last-mile response to the remaining 5 % of emergent threats.

Spoofing & Countermeasures

• Full-chain closed-loop control
– Fuses RF sensing, protocol parsing and comm decoding to identify non-cooperative UAVs.
– Covers the entire facility with a 3 km buffer.
– Delivers:

1.Pre-event early warning

2.Mid-event real-time tracking

3.Post-event pilot back-tracing

Information Theft

• Precision Spoofing & Counter-UAS
– Radiates counterfeit GNSS signals to fool the UAV into hovering, forced-landing or returning home.
– One-to-one jamming; zero impact on nearby power/communication gear.
– Transmit power tailored to national regulations – full compliance on record.

Full-Chain Closed-Loop Control

• Customizable Back-End
– Global device health board, multi-dimensional flight-event analytics, auto-generated subject reports, multi-level user rights.
– Plug-in development for power-security missions.

Customizable Backend

• No-Dead-Zone Surveillance Grid
– Fixed stations: 80 % of substations & key towers.
– Vehicle-mounted patrol: along transmission lines, fills 15 % blind spots (mountains, river spans).
– Man-pack sets for emergency response: final 5 % ad-hoc threats.

Seamless Detection Deployment

• Fixed equipment covers 80 % of substations and key tower bases.
• Vehicle-mounted mobile units patrol transmission corridors, filling 15 % of blind spots in mountainous and river-crossing zones.
• Inspection personnel carry portable devices for last-mile response to the remaining 5 % of emergent threats.

Features

Advantages

Our Solution

Industry-Specific

Tailored for power-generation & grid systems (thermal, wind, solar, nuclear, transmission).

Technology Leadership

Protocol reverse-parsing + multi-RF fusion; detects non-cooperative drones without prior cooperation.

Precision Countermeasures

Device-level directional interference; no impact on legitimate equipment.

Full-Area Coverage

Fixed + vehicle-mounted + man-pack units create a gap-free, multi-layer defense.

Unified Platform

Single console manages all assets; event playback, data reports, role-based access.

Compliant & Non-Destructive

All equipment and countermeasures are non-destructive and non-violent.

Highly Scalable

Seamless upgrade path for EO/IR, radar, 5G-integrated sensing and future technologies.

Related Products

item.title: Prisons
item.dc:creator: wurenji@uchenggroup.com
item.content:encoded:
Prisons Solutions

Serving a variety of sectors, our innovative solutions combine cutting-edge performance with seamless usability to meet the evolving needs of our customers.

THREAT LANDSCAPE

Deployed across key sectors requiring the highest standards of performance.

Contraband Delivery

UAVs carry phones, drugs, knives, etc., and drop or winch them into the prison yard, undermining custody order.

External Collusion

Provide inside-outside comms, escape GPS fixes, and even reconnaissance, creating major security loopholes.

Covert Penetration

Exploit open terrain around prisons, approach low and slow from long range, bypassing conventional security and loitering undetected.

Abilities

Deployed across key sectors requiring the highest standards of performance.

All-Domain Fusion Surveillance System

• Multi-layer network combining passive RF and EO/IR sensors
• CRPC protocol reverse-analysis pinpoints drone model and pilot location
• Tracks radio-silent targets, closing prison-perimeter coverage gaps and solving ID challenges in complex environments

Precision-Graded Countermeasures

• Threat-level-based response: targeted jamming + navigation spoofing
• Full-band coverage blocks contraband drops and external collusion while protecting nearby communications

Rapid Mobile Response

• Portable and vehicle-mounted kits deliver 10-s ID, 30-s engagement
• Fully automated detect-to-defeat chain neutralizes covert penetration and fast incursions

Smart Command & Decision Platform

• One-stop system for device management, threat warning and action orders
• “One aircraft, one file” signature database plus trajectory replay and smart analytics
• Provides comprehensive data support for prison-security decision making

All-Domain Fusion Surveillance System

• Multi-layer network combining passive RF and EO/IR sensors
• CRPC protocol reverse-analysis pinpoints drone model and pilot location
• Tracks radio-silent targets, closing prison-perimeter coverage gaps and solving ID challenges in complex environments

Precision-Graded Countermeasures

• Threat-level-based response: targeted jamming + navigation spoofing
• Full-band coverage blocks contraband drops and external collusion while protecting nearby communications

Rapid Mobile Response

• Portable and vehicle-mounted kits deliver 10-s ID, 30-s engagement
• Fully automated detect-to-defeat chain neutralizes covert penetration and fast incursions

Smart Command & Decision Platform

• One-stop system for device management, threat warning and action orders
• "One aircraft, one file" signature database plus trajectory replay and smart analytics
• Provides comprehensive data support for prison-security decision making

Features

Advantages

Our Solution

Recognition Accuracy

Protocol-level ID — aircraft type, serial, pilot location.

Countermeasure Precision

Surgical strike on rogue drones; zero impact on legitimate devices.

Environmental Adaptability

Dual-mode tuning for dense urban and open-field scenarios.

Platform Intelligence

Trajectory replay, event analytics, pilot geolocation, white/black lists.

Deployment Flexibility

Fixed + vehicle + man-pack triad; supports rapid temporary set-ups.

Target Coverage

Handles cooperative, non-cooperative, FPV, fibre-optic, inertial-navigation — full spectrum.

item.title: Tourist Attractions
item.dc:creator: wurenji@uchenggroup.com
item.content:encoded:
Tourist Attractions Solutions

Serving a variety of sectors, our innovative solutions combine cutting-edge performance with seamless usability to meet the evolving needs of our customers.

THREAT LANDSCAPE

Deployed across key sectors requiring the highest standards of performance.

Physical Damage

Crashes into historic structures or cable-car pylons; incendiary bottles dropped onto forest crowns, triggering wildfires; downed units over crowded plazas injure tourists.

Ecological Disturbance

Propeller and motor noise scare wildlife, causing birds to abandon nests and mammals to flee; night-flight lights disrupt natural rhythms of fireflies and other light-sensitive species.

Privacy Breach

Covert filming of high-end lodges, hot-spring areas and guest rooms; theft and unauthorized dissemination of data on rare-animal habitats within core protection zones.

Abilities

Deployed across key sectors requiring the highest standards of performance.

Resilient, All-Terrain Detection Network

• Passive RF sensing plus EO/IR recognition form a fixed-vehicle-portable triad that adapts to mountains, forests and waterways.
• No active emissions—green monitoring that identifies every drone type and tracks the pilot in real time, balancing terrain limits with ecological protection.

Eco-Friendly Counter-UAS Framework

• Time- and zone-based precision protection: silent counter windows at lodging areas, edge-area mitigation in crowds, birds-first deterrence in nature reserves.
• CRPC-protocol parsing delivers single-target jamming, minimizing impact on visitor rest and wildlife habitats.

Rapid Mobility & Response

• Lightweight man-pack kits and high-mobility vehicle systems deploy within minutes during holidays and major events.
• Real-time pilot location and breadcrumb tracking provide strong enforcement deterrence, easing peak-period staffing and lag.

Smart Data Analytics Platform

• A unified scenic-spot drone database builds a “one aircraft, one file” signature library for full-event traceability.
• Data-driven alerts flag high-risk zones and behaviors, shifting low-altitude safety management from reactive to proactive and precise.

Resilient, All-Terrain Detection Network

• Passive RF sensing plus EO/IR recognition form a fixed-vehicle-portable triad that adapts to mountains, forests and waterways.
• No active emissions—green monitoring that identifies every drone type and tracks the pilot in real time, balancing terrain limits with ecological protection.

Eco-Friendly Counter-UAS Framework

• Time- and zone-based precision protection: silent counter windows at lodging areas, edge-area mitigation in crowds, birds-first deterrence in nature reserves.
• CRPC-protocol parsing delivers single-target jamming, minimizing impact on visitor rest and wildlife habitats.

Rapid Mobility & Response

• Lightweight man-pack kits and high-mobility vehicle systems deploy within minutes during holidays and major events.
• Real-time pilot location and breadcrumb tracking provide strong enforcement deterrence, easing peak-period staffing and lag.

Smart Data Analytics Platform

• A unified scenic-spot drone database builds a “one aircraft, one file” signature library for full-event traceability.
• Data-driven alerts flag high-risk zones and behaviors, shifting low-altitude safety management from reactive to proactive and precise.

Features

Advantages

Our Solution

Scenario Adaptability

Tailored strategies for five key scenic zones: lodging, gathering, water, wildlife, heritage.

Countermeasure Accuracy

Pin-point jamming of specific drones; no impact on legal flights.

Tech Integration

Multi-dimensional fusion of RF, EO/IR, protocol parsing and AI recognition.

Deployment Flexibility

Fixed + mobile + man-pack triad; supports temporary set-ups.

Platform Intelligence

Flight-event analytics, pilot ID, trajectory replay, alert push.

Post-Sales Support

Continuous "one aircraft, one file" updates, protocol-evolution adaptation, algorithm iteration upgrades.

item.title: Event Security
item.dc:creator: wurenji@uchenggroup.com
item.content:encoded:
Event Security Solutions

Serving a variety of sectors, our innovative solutions combine cutting-edge performance with seamless usability to meet the evolving needs of our customers.

THREAT LANDSCAPE

Deployed across key sectors requiring the highest standards of performance.

Physical Nuisance

During major events, consumer drones take off illegally in surges; pilots adopt “hit-and-run” tactics, switching launch points repeatedly, easily causing crowd panic or collisions with stages / LED screens.

Sensitive Attacks

Covert filming of VIPs’ or athletes’ convoy routes, dropping leaflets / incendiary bottles, jamming event communication-truck signals—posing political and security risks.

Order Disruption

Legally-registered media drones deviate from flight paths and mix with illegal aircraft; mis-identification & mis-countermeasures may interrupt live broadcasts and hinder event support.

Abilities

Deployed across key sectors requiring the highest standards of performance.

Rapid-Response Deployment System

• Three-tier defense for temporary no-fly zones:
– Fixed nodes for forward area control
– Mobile convoy escort protection
– Man-pack gear for gap-filling
• Full system deployed and recovered within 3 hours to counter hit-and-run rogue flights

Precision ID & Control Mechanism

• “White/Black List + Temporary Airspace Take-over” dual model
• White-listed media drones cleared instantly; non-cooperative or off-course targets identified and engaged in seconds
• Eliminates misclassification when legal and illegal aircraft mix

Dynamic Escort Capability

• Vehicle-mounted detect-and-defeat system provides continuous moving-airspace cover for VIP convoys
• Shields high-profile moving targets from covert filming or attack along entire route

Smart Command & Dispatch Platform

• Rapidly-deployable temporary C2 platform integrating flight approval, asset dispatch and police coordination
• Real-time rogue-flight tracking and full incident playback
• Boosts detection and disposal efficiency against highly mobile pilots

Rapid-Response Deployment System

• Three-tier defense for temporary no-fly zones:
– Fixed nodes for forward area control
– Mobile convoy escort protection
– Man-pack gear for gap-filling
• Full system deployed and recovered within 3 hours to counter hit-and-run rogue flights

Precision ID & Control Mechanism

• "White/Black List + Temporary Airspace Take-over" dual model
• White-listed media drones cleared instantly; non-cooperative or off-course targets identified and engaged in seconds
• Eliminates misclassification when legal and illegal aircraft mix

Dynamic Escort Capability

• Vehicle-mounted detect-and-defeat system provides continuous moving-airspace cover for VIP convoys
• Shields high-profile moving targets from covert filming or attack along entire route

Smart Command & Dispatch Platform

• Rapidly-deployable temporary C2 platform integrating flight approval, asset dispatch and police coordination
• Real-time rogue-flight tracking and full incident playback
• Boosts detection and disposal efficiency against highly mobile pilots

Features

Advantages

Our Solution

Rapid Response

Temporary perimeter & platform deployed within 3 hours; full pull-out after event, zero footprint left.

White/Black List

Cooperative aircraft fly legally; black-flight drones identified & engaged in seconds – no collateral, no missed calls.

All-Scenario Coverage

Fixed sites + moving routes, forward-position + convoy + man-pack triad.

Man-Pack Light

Hand-held unit <2 kg, 12 h battery, one-button start, operable by a single officer.

Platform Synergy

City-district-on-scene three-tier C2, interfaces with police/traffic/civil-aviation systems; full incident traceability.

Evergreen Update Service

Continuous "one aircraft, one file" signature library, protocol refreshes, algorithm iterations and custom development.

Sustained Service

Post-event Special-Security Summary + Black-Flight Incident Report provided; data export supported.

item.title: About Us
item.dc:creator: wurenji@uchenggroup.com
item.content:encoded:
About US

LISK FENCE: Your Trusted Airspace Security Specialist

Core Slogan

Technology Drives the Future, Innovation Safeguards Security

Add Your Heading Text Here

LISK FENCE International Trading Company Limited is a global technology enterprise focused on the R&D and application of high-end security solutions. As an Airspace Safety Specialist, we specialize in delivering cutting-edge Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) systems and Counter-UAV (C-UAS) technologies, complemented by essential security equipment to provide end-to-end airspace protection for customers worldwide.

Guided by our core mission, we are committed to turning pioneering research into field-proven solutions. Our expertise lies in creating AI-driven airspace shields that address modern security challenges, from rogue drone intrusions to complex threat scenarios.

Our Core Strengths

Global Presence & Trust

Our products have been successfully deployed across Africa, Eastern Europe, Central Asia, and Southeast Asia. We’ve earned a reputation as a reliable international brand through high-quality hardware, tailored customer service, and consistent performance in the most demanding environments.

Comprehensive Security Solutions

We offer a full-spectrum portfolio of counter-UAV systems, covering portable, handheld, vehicle-mounted, and fixed-site configurations—designed to secure airspace from 0 to 10 km. Our technologies integrate multiple defense principles, including:
1. Detection: Full-frequency coverage (70MHz–6.2GHz) with active and passive detection methods for stealth and accuracy.
2. Neutralization: Jamming, spoofing, and physical countermeasures to safely repel, force-land, or disable unauthorized drones.
3. Adaptability: Military-grade durability with resistance to extreme temperatures (-40℃ to +65℃) and harsh environmental conditions.

Our Vision

We strive to lead global counter-UAV innovation, advancing airspace security technologies to build a smarter, safer ecosystem for every sector. As your long-term partner, we combine technical excellence, customizable solutions, and global expertise to defend what matters most.

Contact Us

For inquiries about our security solutions or to discuss your specific needs, reach out to our global team today.

CONTACT US

item.title: P1000D
item.dc:creator: wurenji@uchenggroup.com
item.content:encoded:
P1000D

FPV Video Transmission Snapshot
Product Type: Handheld

Full coverage of FPV

FPV video transmission interception

Video storage

Team collaborative operations

REQUEST INFORMATION

Advantages

Deployed across key sectors requiring the highest standards of performance.

Portable Design

Equipped with a multi – functional wrist strap, supporting various carrying methods.

FPV Full Coverage

Full coverage of the analog video transmission frequency band from 300MHz to 6.2GHz.

Full - frequency Detection

Full – frequency coverage from 70MHz to 6.2GHz.

Team Collaboration

Adopting a 1 + N working mode with a master – slave machine design, which can achieve alarm linkage.

FPV Video Transmission Interception

Intercept analog FPV video to view first-person feeds analyze intrusion targets and store footage.

Portable Design

Equipped with a multi - functional wrist strap, supporting various carrying methods.

FPV Full Coverage

Full coverage of the analog video transmission frequency band from 300MHz to 6.2GHz.

Full - frequency Detection

Full - frequency coverage from 70MHz to 6.2GHz.

Team Collaboration

Adopting a 1 + N working mode with a master - slave machine design, which can achieve alarm linkage.

FPV Video Transmission Interception

Intercept analog FPV video to view first-person feeds analyze intrusion targets and store footage.

Features

Recognition type

The vast majority of mainstream - brand drones and most FPV drones

Detection frequency band

It supports custom scanning from 70MHz to 6GHz. By default, the frequencies are 400MHz, 500MHz, 900MHz, 1.2GHz, 1.4GHz, 2.4GHz, 5.2GHz, and 5.8GHz.

Detection radius

≥1.5km

FPV video transmission detection

It supports the detection of all analog video transmissions within the frequency range of 300MHz - 6GHz (customization is supported).

Video transmission interception distance

≥1km (with unobstructed line - of - sight and clean electromagnetic environment)

Team alarm linkage

≥500m (in open and unobstructed areas)

Storage space

32 - capacity memory card

Screen size

7 - inch touch screen

Battery life

≥6h (main unit); ≥10h (wrist strap)

Main unit dimensions

198mm * 142mm * 52mm

item.title: P1000-AB
item.dc:creator: wurenji@uchenggroup.com
item.content:encoded:
P1000-AB

Team Combat Communication Device
Product Type: Handheld

Synchronized warning for the workgroup

Early Warning & Alarm Mode

Full - frequency passive detection

Super - strong FPV (First - Person View) early warning

REQUEST INFORMATION

Advantages

Deployed across key sectors requiring the highest standards of performance.

Team Synchronized Alarm

After the host detects a drone, the terminal devices will issue synchronized alarms through lights and vibrations.

1+N Team Coordination

Adopting a master – slave machine design with encrypted communication, it supports team – based coordinated operations and joint strikes.

Dual-mode Detection

Freely switch between two detection modes, namely spectrum power detection and spectrum feature matching detection.

Full-frequency coverage

It fully covers the mainstream frequency bands from 70MHz to 6.2GHz, with 8 – 12 key detection frequency bands.

Super - strong FPV Early Warning

Warning With unique baseband signal analysis and identification technology, it can quickly issue early warnings for quadcopters, fixed – wing aircraft, DIY drones, FPV drones, etc.

Team Synchronized Alarm

After the host detects a drone, the terminal devices will issue synchronized alarms through lights and vibrations.

1+N Team Coordination

Adopting a master - slave machine design with encrypted communication, it supports team - based coordinated operations and joint strikes.

Dual-mode Detection

Freely switch between two detection modes, namely spectrum power detection and spectrum feature matching detection.

Full-frequency coverage

It fully covers the mainstream frequency bands from 70MHz to 6.2GHz, with 8 - 12 key detection frequency bands.

Super - strong FPV Early Warning

Warning With unique baseband signal analysis and identification technology, it can quickly issue early warnings for quadcopters, fixed - wing aircraft, DIY drones, FPV drones, etc.

Features

Recognition type

The vast majority of mainstream - brand drones and most FPV drones

Detection frequency band

It supports custom scanning from 70MHz to 6GHz. By default, the frequencies are 400MHz, 800MHz, 900MHz, 1.2GHz, 1.4GHz, 2.4GHz, 5.2GHz, and 5.8GHz.

Detection radius

≥1.5km

Battery life

The operating duration of the detection host is ≥6 hours, and that of the team terminal is ≥10 hours.

Detection principle

Spectrum scanning and spectrum feature identification

Warning method

Sound, vibration, light

Power supply method

Removable lithium - battery

Detection response time

≤3s

Operating temperature

−20℃ to +50℃

Language

Chinese/English/Russian (Customization for multiple languages is supported)

item.title: P2000DJ
item.dc:creator: wurenji@uchenggroup.com
item.content:encoded:
P2000DJ

Detection and Countermeasure Shield
Product Type: Shield-Style

Shield-shaped integrated

design Rapid mobile deployment

Full-frequency passive

detection Intelligent touch screen

REQUEST INFORMATION

Advantages

Deployed across key sectors requiring the highest standards of performance.

Full-frequency-domain coverage

Detect key frequency bands from 400MHz to 6GHz, covering all mainstream models

Precise and efficient countermeasures

Output interference signals efficiently, with a countermeasure distance of up to 1.5 km (depending on the model).

High portability

The device is small, lightweight, and easy to carry and operate, suitable for temporary and mobile deployments in various scenarios.

User - friendly

With a human-centered design, it is easy to operate and can be used without complex training.

Integrated design

It features a high degree of integration, strong flexibility, and mobility, enabling efficient deployment in any defense field.

Full-frequency-domain coverage

Detect key frequency bands from 400MHz to 6GHz, covering all mainstream models

Precise and efficient countermeasures

Output interference signals efficiently, with a countermeasure distance of up to 1.5 km (depending on the model).

High portability

The device is small, lightweight, and easy to carry and operate, suitable for temporary and mobile deployments in various scenarios.

User - friendly

With a human-centered design, it is easy to operate and can be used without complex training.

Integrated design

It features a high degree of integration, strong flexibility, and mobility, enabling efficient deployment in any defense field.

Features

Detection frequency band

400MHz-1500MHz、 2200-2500MHz、 5150-5950MHz

Detecting distance

≥2km (depending on the operating conditions and the model of the machine/equipment)

Detection angle

The detection angle in the horizontal direction covers 0° to 360°.

Countermeasure frequency band

900MHz、 1.2GHz、 1.5GHz、 2.4GHz、 5.2GHz、 5.8GHz

Interference coverage angle

It is possible to choose individual communication jamming, individual navigation jamming, or full - frequency jamming.

Operation screen

≥3.5 - inch touch screen, displaying information such as UAV frequency bands and signal strength

Standby time

≥20h. It has the detection and alarm function during standby.

Network - based supervision

It can be interconnected at multiple levels with mobile phone terminals (APPs) and back - end command and management platforms (optional).

Weight

≤8Kg (include batteries)

Size

390mm * 160mm * 330mm

item.title: P1500D
item.dc:creator: wurenji@uchenggroup.com
item.content:encoded:
P1500D

FPV Video Transmission Snapshot & Positioning Pilot Device
Product Type: Backpack-Mount

Full coverage of FPV

FPV video transmission interception

Positioning Pilot

Multiple Deployment Forms

REQUEST INFORMATION

Advantages

Deployed across key sectors requiring the highest standards of performance.

Full-frequency detection

Full – frequency coverage from 70MHz to 6.2GHz.

Multiple Deployment Forms

Catering to Different Application Scenarios

FPV Full Coverage

Full coverage of the analog video transmission frequency band from 300MHz to 6.2GHz.

FPV Video Transmission Interception

Intercept FPV video to view first-person feeds analyze targets live and store footage.

Integrated design

It features a high degree of integration, strong flexibility, and mobility, enabling efficient deployment in any defense field.

Full-frequency detection

Full - frequency coverage from 70MHz to 6.2GHz.

Multiple Deployment Forms

Catering to Different Application Scenarios

FPV Full Coverage

Full coverage of the analog video transmission frequency band from 300MHz to 6.2GHz.

FPV Video Transmission Interception

Intercept FPV video to view first-person feeds analyze targets live and store footage.

Integrated design

It features a high degree of integration, strong flexibility, and mobility, enabling efficient deployment in any defense field.

Features

Recognition type

The vast majority of mainstream - brand drones and most FPV drones

Detection frequency band

It supports custom scanning from 70MHz to 6GHz. By default, the frequencies are 400MHz, 800MHz, 900MHz, 1.2GHz, 1.4GHz, 2.4GHz, 5.2GHz, and 5.8GHz.

Detection range

Mainstream-brand drones ≥10KM, FPV ≥2KM

DID/RID positioning range

DID ≥10KM, RID ≥5KM

Video Transmission Interception Range

≥1.5KM

FPV Video Transmission Detection

≥1.5KM

Precision

≤10m

Video Transmission Detection Frequency Band

Supports detection of all analog video transmissions within the 300MHz−6GHz frequency band (user-customizable).

Size

400mm∗165mm∗500mm

Battery life

≥6h

item.title: P1500J
item.dc:creator: wurenji@uchenggroup.com
item.content:encoded:
P1500J

UAV defense equipment
Product Type: Backpack-Mount

8 - frequency Super - strong Interference

High environmental adaptability

REQUEST INFORMATION

Features

External Antennas

8 omnidirectional antennas (6–8 dBi)

Handheld Directional Antenna

1 set high-gain directional antenna

VSWR Protection

Antenna open-circuit / short-circuit protection

Built-in Battery

1 h operation; 48 h standby; 5 h charging time

Power Input

AC 90–260 V / DC 24–30 V

Weight

35 kg per unit

Total Output Power

300 W

Power Consumption

600 W

Band 1

1575–1610 MHz; 40 W / 46 ±1.5 dBm

Band 2

2400–2500 MHz; 40 W / 46 ±1.5 dBm

Band 3

5725–5850 MHz; 30 W / 45 ±1.5 dBm

Band 4

433 MHz; 40 W / 46 ±1.5 dBm

Band 5

860–930 MHz; 40 W / 46 ±1.5 dBm

Band 6

1170–1280 MHz; 40 W / 46 ±1.5 dBm

Band 7

5150–5250 MHz; 30 W / 45 ±1.5 dBm

Protection Functions

VSWR protection; over-temperature protection

Thermal Control

Shutdown at 70°C; recovery at 65°C

Cooling Method

Forced air cooling (fan)

Control Method

Independent control buttons for each band

Indicators

Power and status indicator lights

External Control

External wired remote controller

Battery Specification

25 Ah lithium battery

Installation Method

Backpack-type main unit

Operating Temperature

-20°C to +65°C

Ingress Protection

IP52

Relative Humidity

5%–95%

item.content:encoded:
G2000-A

UAV detection and defense equipment
Product Type: Gun-Style

Key full frequency detection

Super - strong FPV interference

6 - frequency Super - strong Interference

High environmental-adaptability

REQUEST INFORMATION

Advantages

Deployed across key sectors requiring the highest standards of performance.

Full - frequency domain coverage

Detection in key frequency bands from 400MHz to 6GHz, covering all mainstream models.

Integrated design

High degree of integration, strong flexibility and mobility, and can be efficiently deployed in any defense area.

Multi-coordinated linkage

Equipped with components such as a telescopic sight, and can be used in linkage with devices such as navigation deception equipment.

Military - grade quality

The entire body is made of aviation aluminum, resistant to high and low temperatures, and has strong environmental adaptability.

Military - grade quality

The entire body is made of aviation aluminum, resistant to high and low temperatures, and has strong environmental adaptability.

Full - frequency domain coverage

Detection in key frequency bands from 400MHz to 6GHz, covering all mainstream models.

Integrated design

High degree of integration, strong flexibility and mobility, and can be efficiently deployed in any defense area.

Multi-coordinated linkage

Equipped with components such as a telescopic sight, and can be used in linkage with devices such as navigation deception equipment.

Military - grade quality

The entire body is made of aviation aluminum, resistant to high and low temperatures, and has strong environmental adaptability.

Military - grade quality

The entire body is made of aviation aluminum, resistant to high and low temperatures, and has strong environmental adaptability.

Features

Detection frequency band

400MHz−1500MHz、 2200MHz−2500MHz、 5100MHz−5900MHz

Detecting distance

≥2km (depending on the operating conditions and the model of the machine/equipment)

Countermeasure frequency band

900MHz、 1.2GHz、 1.4GHz、 1.5GHz、 2.4GHz、 5.8GHz

Countering distance

≥2km (depending on the operating conditions and the model of the machine/equipment)

Working hours

≥24h

Working temperature

−40℃−+60℃

Weight

≤6.5kg (include batteries)

Size

770mm∗110mm∗305mm

Language

Chinese/English/Russian

item.title: G1500DJS
item.dc:creator: wurenji@uchenggroup.com
item.content:encoded:
G1500DJS

UAV detection, defense, spoofing equipment
Product Type: Gun-Style

Key full frequency detection

4 - frequency Super - strong Interference

Effective spoofing capability

High environmental adaptability

REQUEST INFORMATION

Features

Recognition type

The vast majority of mainstream - brand drones and most FPV drones

Detection frequency band

It supports custom scanning from 25MHz to 6GHz. By default, the frequencies are 400MHz, 800MHz, 900MHz, 1.2GHz, 1.4GHz, 2.4GHz, 5.2GHz, and 5.8GHz.

Detection range

Detection range: ≥2 km (UAV localization).

Video Transmission Detection Frequency Band

Supports detection of all analog video transmissions within the 300MHz–6GHz frequency band (user-customizable).

Jamming range

≥1.5 km.

Spoofing signals

GPS-L1 & GLONASS-L1

Spoofing response

≤5s

Transmission bands

• Ch1: (840±10)MHz - (930±10)MHz

• Ch2: (1550±10)MHz - (1620±10)MHz

• Ch3: (2400±10)MHz - (2500±10)MHz

• Ch4: (5650±10)MHz - (5850±10)MHz

• Per-channel instantaneous bandwidth ≥100MHz.

Operational endurance

• Detection: ≥6h

• Countermeasures: >40min

Multi-target capacity

• ≥15 UAVs

• ≥8 non-DJI remote controllers

item.title: V5000-AB
item.dc:creator: wurenji@uchenggroup.com
item.content:encoded:
V5000-AB

UAV detection and defense equipment
Product Type: Vehicle-Mounted

3 variable forms

360° Full - frequency Detection and Engagement

Super - strong strike performance

High adaptability and convenient deployment

REQUEST INFORMATION

Advantages

Deployed across key sectors requiring the highest standards of performance.

360° Full-Band Detection & Response

Covers all mainstream aircraft models, operates autonomously, and conducts detection and strike in all directions and from multiple angles.

Unattended Operation

When a drone is detected, it can quickly and automatically initiate a coordinated countermeasure to drive the drone out of the defense zone.

Black and White Lists

One – click marking of black and white lists is available. UAVs on the white list are not interfered with.

High Expandability

It can be flexibly deployed on various vehicle models and supports both single – unit operation and multi – unit networking operation.

Military - grade Quality

It can withstand high and low temperatures and has strong environmental adaptability.

High Stability

Adopts a low – wind – resistance shape design, which can maintain the stability and safety of the equipment at high speeds.

360° Full-Band Detection & Response

Covers all mainstream aircraft models, operates autonomously, and conducts detection and strike in all directions and from multiple angles.

Unattended Operation

When a drone is detected, it can quickly and automatically initiate a coordinated countermeasure to drive the drone out of the defense zone.

Black and White Lists

One - click marking of black and white lists is available. UAVs on the white list are not interfered with.

High Expandability

It can be flexibly deployed on various vehicle models and supports both single - unit operation and multi - unit networking operation.

Military - grade Quality

It can withstand high and low temperatures and has strong environmental adaptability.

High Stability

Adopts a low - wind - resistance shape design, which can maintain the stability and safety of the equipment at high speeds.

Features

Detection frequency band

300MHz-6GHz Full - frequency band scanning, detection, display

Detecting distance

≥5km (depending on the operating conditions and the model of the machine/equipment)

Detection altitude

0∼1200m

Countermeasure frequency band

900MHz, 1.2GHz, 1.5GHz, 2.4GHz, 5.2GHz, 5.8GHz

Countering distance

≥3km (depending on the operating conditions and the model of the machine/equipment)

Countering range

Horizontal direction: 360°; pitch direction: −90°∼+90°

Working hours

≥24h

Working temperature

(−20℃∼+60℃)±2℃

Weight

64.25kg

Size

800mm∗600mm (Diameter * Height)

item.title: F3000DJ
item.dc:creator: wurenji@uchenggroup.com
item.content:encoded:
F3000DJ

UAV detection and defense equipment
Product Type: Vehicle-Mounted

Key full frequency detection

4 - frequency Super - strong Interference

Effective spoofing capability

High environmental adaptability

REQUEST INFORMATION

Features

Jamming Frequency Bands

433 MHz, 900 MHz, 1.4 GHz, 1.5 GHz, 2.4 GHz, 5.2 GHz, 5.8 GHz (expandable)

Priority Frequency Bands

400 MHz, 800 MHz, 900 MHz, 1.2 GHz, 1.4 GHz, 2.4 GHz, 5.2 GHz, 5.8 GHz

Frequency Range

30 MHz to 6 GHz

Jamming Modes

Broadband jamming / Precision jamming

Jamming Angle

360° omnidirectional

Jamming Radius

≥3 km (depending on environment and UAV type)

Detection Radius

0–10 km (depending on deployment environment and target UAV)

Response Time (Jamming)

≤5 s (RMS)

Response Time (Detection)

≤2 s (RMS)

Coverage

360° full airspace

Direction Finding Accuracy

≤3° (RMS)

Single-Station Positioning

UAV and controller tracking; supports TDOA/AOA networked positioning

Horizontal Positioning Accuracy

≤3 m (RMS)

Vertical Positioning Accuracy

≤3 m (RMS)

Operator Positioning Accuracy

≤6 m (RMS)

Jamming-to-Signal Ratio (JSR)

≥20:1 (depending on environment and UAV type)

Simultaneous Jamming Capacity

≥20 UAVs

Simultaneous Detection Capacity

≥40 UAVs

False Alarm Rate

≤1 event per 2 hours

Operating Temperature

-40°C to +70°C

Ingress Protection

IP66

item.title: T6000DJ
item.dc:creator: wurenji@uchenggroup.com
item.content:encoded:
T6000DJ

UAV detection and defense equipment
Product Type: Vehicle-Mounted

360°full-frequency passive detection

1+N collaborative linkage

Super - strong FPV interference

13 omnidirectional+4 directional sides

REQUEST INFORMATION

Advantages

Deployed across key sectors requiring the highest standards of performance.

Detachable Design

Detection and defense can be integrated or separated. One detection device can form a network and work in tandem with N countermeasure devices.

Super - strong FPV Interference

By default, it has 13 countermeasure frequency bands and supports multi – frequency band expansion.

High Expandability

It can expand and integrate equipment such as radar, optoelectronics, and navigation deception devices.

Unattended Operation

When a drone is detected, it can quickly and automatically initiate a coordinated countermeasure to drive the drone out of the defense zone.

Precise Positioning and Tracking

It can track the drone’s trajectory in real – time, enabling accurate and efficient counter – intervention work.

Military - grade Quality

The entire body is made of aviation aluminum, making it resistant to high and low temperatures and highly adaptable to various environments.

Detachable Design

Detection and defense can be integrated or separated. One detection device can form a network and work in tandem with N countermeasure devices.

Super - strong FPV Interference

By default, it has 13 countermeasure frequency bands and supports multi - frequency band expansion.

High Expandability

It can expand and integrate equipment such as radar, optoelectronics, and navigation deception devices.

Unattended Operation

When a drone is detected, it can quickly and automatically initiate a coordinated countermeasure to drive the drone out of the defense zone.

Precise Positioning and Tracking

It can track the drone's trajectory in real - time, enabling accurate and efficient counter - intervention work.

Military - grade Quality

The entire body is made of aviation aluminum, making it resistant to high and low temperatures and highly adaptable to various environments.

Features

Detection range

70MHz-6GHz Full - frequency band scanning, detection, display

Detecting distance

≥10km (depending on the operating conditions and the model of the machine/equipment)

Countering distance

≥5km (depending on the operating conditions and the model of the machine/equipment)

Countermeasure frequency band

410MHz-480MHz、650MHz-750MHz、750MHz-850MHz 850MHz-1080MHz、1050MHz-1200MHz、1200MHz-1340MHz、1340MHz-1500MHz、1560MHz-1620MHz、4000MHz-4300MHz、5950MHz-6200MHz、5100MHz-5300MHz、5700MHz-5950MHz、2450MHz-2600MHz (Customizable)

Working temperature

(−40℃−+60℃)±2℃

Weight

≤150kg

Size

1000mm∗2400mm (Diameter * Height)
